_meta.notes: aspects = essentia/vis cost (null value = computed at runtime, see aspectsComputed). output/input/central/components/inputs resolved to EN/RU names where the item ref maps to a lang key; otherwise {ref,meta} (ConfigItems/ConfigBlocks field) or {vanilla:srgName} or {oredict}. research = linked research key. infusion has instability + central + components.
